creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Turning 43 and embracing every phase life brought me this year. 💕

* I welcomed the year with new stems cells.
* Was in my turban era for quite a while
* Impatiently waited for my hair to grow back, so I decided to wear a wig to make myself feel better 
* And now on my birthday, I’m standing proud in my natural crown. 👸🏻

Thank you God for the quiet strength that held me steady. 🙏🏻 

Thank you to my dearest @edzphotography for always holding my hand.

Thank you to my Doctors and nurses for taking care of me, most especially at my lowest times. 

Thank you to my family, colleagues and friends for keeping me in your prayers. 

#LifeLately #ladyandhersweetescapes • Battling Leukemia • Acute Myeloid Leukemia • Dubai • Birthday Reel

transcription.text: You will be my girl, my girl, my girl, my girl
